zh.lifeSummary: 當Jan Vilain van Gent於1365年出生在法國時，他的父親Jan Jan Wouter !! Jordaan Alexander (RR)(BG) van Gent Vilain36歲，母親Margaretha Rutger Rutger van Gent de Gand Briseteste Huysse25歲。他於1380年之前與Margaretha Arnoud van Gavere在艾歐洛結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1419年1月在法國布格-福朗-可特艾o-達維利亞恩--度斯莫斯享年54歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jan Vilain van Gent于1365年出生在法国时，他的父亲Jan Jan Wouter !! Jordaan Alexander (RR)(BG) van Gent Vilain36岁，母亲Margaretha Rutger Rutger van Gent de Gand Briseteste Huysse25岁。他于1380年之前与Margaretha Arnoud van Gavere在艾歐洛结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1419年1月在法国布格-福朗-可特艾o-達維利亞恩--度斯莫斯享年54岁。

nameMeanings.name: Vilain
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English:  see  Villain  .

variants.name: Villain
meanings: Norman, English: status name from Anglo-Norman French villein, vilein ‘serf, bondman, servile tenant’, denoting an occupier or cultivator of land who was entirely subject to a lord or was attached to a manor.

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Gent
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern) and French: nickname from Old French gent, Middle English gent(e) ‘high born, noble’, hence ‘noble of character or conduct, courteous’, also ‘nice, friendly’.
English: habitational name from Ghent (Gent in Dutch), a city in Flanders, Belgium. Compare Ghent .
German: from a short form of an ancient Germanic personal name formed with gand ‘spell’, such as Gandolf.

variants.name: Jent
meanings: English: variant of   Gent  .

variants.name: Ghent
meanings: English: habitational name from Ghent (Gent in Dutch), a city in Flanders, Belgium. Compare Gent .

variants.name: Gentes
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Armand, Henri, Lucien, Marcel, Normand.
French (Gentès): probably a nickname derived from Old French gent ‘high born, noble’, also ‘nice, friendly’.
German: patronymic from the personal name   Gent  .

variants.name: Genther
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Fritz, Otto.
German:
variant of   Gent  .

variants.name: Genthe
meanings: German: variant of Gente (see Gent ), or a habitational name from Gentha in Saxony-Anhalt, east of Wittenberg.

nameMeanings.name: Jan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

variants.name: John
meanings: New Testament: ‘God is gracious’. See John .

en.lifeSummary: When Jan Vilain van Gent was born in 1365, in France, his father, Jan Jan Wouter !! Jordaan Alexander (RR)(BG) van Gent Vilain, was 36 and his mother, Margaretha Rutger Rutger van Gent de Gand Briseteste Huysse, was 25. He married Margaretha Arnoud van Gavere before 1380, in Europe. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 4 daughters. He died in January 1419, in Villaines-en-Duesmois, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jan Vilain van Gent est né en 1365, à France, son père, Jan Jan Wouter !! Jordaan Alexander (RR)(BG) van Gent Vilain, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Margaretha Rutger Rutger van Gent de Gand Briseteste Huysse, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Margaretha Arnoud van Gavere avant 1380, à Europe. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en janvier 1419, à Villaines-en-Duesmois, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, à l’âge de 54 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jan Vilain van Gent 1365 in Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Jan Jan Wouter !! Jordaan Alexander (RR)(BG) van Gent Vilain 36 und seine Mutter Margaretha Rutger Rutger van Gent de Gand Briseteste Huysse 25. Er hat vor 1380 in Europa Margaretha Arnoud van Gavere geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb im Januar 1419 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Villaines-en-Duesmois, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jan Vilain van Gent è nato il nel 1365 nel Francia, il suo padre, Jan Jan Wouter !! Jordaan Alexander (RR)(BG) van Gent Vilain, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Margaretha Rutger Rutger van Gent de Gand Briseteste Huysse, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Margaretha Arnoud van Gavere prima del 1380, nel Europa. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel gennaio 1419, nel Villaines-en-Duesmois, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, all'età di 54 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jan Vilain van Gentが1365年にフランスで生まれた時，父Jan Jan Wouter !! Jordaan Alexander (RR)(BG) van Gent Vilainは36歳，母Margaretha Rutger Rutger van Gent de Gand Briseteste Huysseは25歳であった。1380年以前にヨーロッパでMargaretha Arnoud van Gavereと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1419年1月にフランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeクoテ-ド'オルヴィレアイネス-エン-ドウエスモイスで54歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jan Vilain van Gent(이)가 1365년 프랑스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Jan Jan Wouter !! Jordaan Alexander (RR)(BG) van Gent Vilain(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaretha Rutger Rutger van Gent de Gand Briseteste Huysse(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1380년 이전 우럽에서 Margaretha Arnoud van Gavere(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1419년 1월 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e co테-드'어 비레이네스--드스모이스에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jan Vilain van Gent nasceu em 1365, em França, seu pai, Jan Jan Wouter !! Jordaan Alexander (RR)(BG) van Gent Vilain, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Margaretha Rutger Rutger van Gent de Gand Briseteste Huysse, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaretha Arnoud van Gavere antes 1380, em Europa. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em janeiro de 1419, em Villaines-en-Duesmois, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, França, com 54 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jan Vilain van Gent родился в 1365 г. в местности Франция, его отцу по имени Jan Jan Wouter !! Jordaan Alexander (RR)(BG) van Gent Vilain было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaretha Rutger Rutger van Gent de Gand Briseteste Huysse, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaretha Arnoud van Gavere перед 1380 г. в местности Европа. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер январь 1419 г. в местности виллеинес-ен-дуесмоис, кoте-д'ор, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция в возрасте 54 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jan Vilain van Gent nació en 1365, en Francia, su papá, Jan Jan Wouter !! Jordaan Alexander (RR)(BG) van Gent Vilain, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Margaretha Rutger Rutger van Gent de Gand Briseteste Huysse, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Margaretha Arnoud van Gavere antes de 1380, en Europa. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en enero de 1419, en Villaines-en-Duesmois, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, a la edad de 54 años.
